## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation. Link related issues
(e.g. `Closes #12`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] CI / build / security
- [ ] Documentation

## Component(s)

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Agent
- [ ] Contract
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Repo / CI

## How was this tested?

Describe the tests you ran (commands, endpoints hit, tx hashes, screenshots).

- [ ] `cargo test` passes (if contract touched)
- [ ] Backend imports / runs locally (if backend touched)
- [ ] CI is green

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, private keys)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] PR is focused on a single concern
